issues.description:
## Missing Authorization Check

The DELETE /users/:id endpoint allows any authenticated user to delete any user account without checking privileges.

### Call Stack / Data Flow

1. `DELETE /api/users/:id` → `routes/users.ts:45`
2. `deleteUserHandler()` extracts `userId` from `req.params`
3. Direct database deletion without authorization check

### Attack Scenario

1. Attacker authenticates as regular user
2. Sends DELETE to `/api/users/admin-id`
3. Admin account is deleted

### Recommendation

Add authorization middleware to verify the requesting user has delete permissions.

## SQL Injection in Order Query

User input is concatenated directly into SQL query string.

### Recommendation

Use parameterized queries instead of string concatenation.
